title: Function parameters should have type hints
description: Type hints allow for better understanding of function parameters and potential errors.
message: Function parameter should have a type hint.
recommendation: Add type hints to function parameters.

compliant.code:
from typing import List, Tuple
def my_func(arg: List[int]) -> Tuple[int, int]: pass

why_is_this_an_issue: Type hints make code more understandable, improving maintainability.
how_to_fix: Add type hints to function parameters.

metadata.title: Function parameters should have type hints
